solidity storage collision proxy edge case wording

messages.text: Дім, інваріант знову падає на edge-case з rebalance. Я не бачу, чи це наш harness кривий, чи вони реально зламали accounting. глянеш?
Confirmed two medium findings. Writing them up now with repro steps and impact notes. No criticals so far, but I need one more pass before I call that final.
Dinner late, sorry. Client expanded scope like absolute clowns and I need to close the diff tonight. Don’t wait if you’re hungry.
Can you send the exact deployment scripts and current test fixtures? The repo state doesn’t match staging, so findings may be against stale assumptions.
Heads-down until late. Not ignoring you, just in report mode. Will surface when brain is less fried.
Дім, я вже задовбався з цим scope creep. Вони хочуть polished report, але кожні дві години докидають новий контракт. Треба якось жорстко обрізати.
Так, буду в неділю якщо не втоплюсь у звіті. Можу принести powerbank для збору, напишіть кому віддати.
Shipped. Finally. Ramen near Alameda? I want something hot and zero screens for an hour.
Thanks for reaching out. I have availability for a focused review next sprint, starting Tuesday, assuming the codebase is frozen and docs are ready by Monday EOD.
Look at Mykola’s face in this one 😂 Are you and Sonya still thinking July for Warsaw, or only after Lviv wedding chaos calms down?
Afternoon works. Same side of the river, flexible 16-18. Keep it boring, no names, confirm only when you’re 20 min out.
Need to run a short errand near the river after lunch. Should be quick, maybe 40 min. Nothing dramatic.
ахаха це буквально ти на кожному KPI дедлайні. Як у Києві зі світлом зараз? Батько каже то норм, то знову цирк.
Lviv plan sounds good. Sonya and I can do the venue visit on Friday, and I’ll help with deposits once you send the exact numbers. Обіймаю всіх.
Next week I’m taking only light client calls. No full reviews unless it’s tiny. Need to reset before I become permanently ngmi.
